---
name: Platform improvement request
about: Suggest enhancements for Career OS CLI tools, desktop app features, or marketplace architecture
title: "[FEATURE] Short feature summary"
labels: feature-request, platform
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "I cannot easily search agents by difficulty level in the CLI.")

**Describe the proposed solution**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Add any design mockups or architecture references.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, CLI flags, or mock logs about the feature request here.
